query:
SELECT 
  cm.isbn13,
  cm.title,
  cm.author,
  cm.publisher,
  inv.uuid,
  inv.locationCode,
  inv.status,
  inv.createdAt
FROM catalog_masters cm
LEFT JOIN inventory_items inv ON cm.isbn13 = inv.isbn13
WHERE cm.isbn13 = '9788420685083'
ORDER BY inv.createdAt DESC

  cm.author,
  cm.publisher,
  inv.uuid,
  inv.locationCode,
  inv.status,
  inv.createdAt
FROM catalog_masters cm
LEFT JOIN inventory_items inv ON cm.isbn13 = inv.isbn13
WHERE cm.isbn13 = '9788420685083'
ORDER BY inv.createdAt DESC
